mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT ON (ot.id) ot.id AS "ticketId", CASE pov.code WHEN 'U133192' THEN '4000' WHEN 'U128160' THEN '8000' WHEN 'U134503' THEN '5000' WHEN 'U133189' THEN '6000' END AS "corpCd", CASE pov.code WHEN 'U133192' THEN '11900078' WHEN 'U128160' THEN '20001073' WHEN 'U134503' THEN '11900033' WHEN 'U133189' THEN '20000467' END AS "contNo", ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ot.id) AS "seq", TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDD') AS "issueDate", pov.code AS "goodsNo", 1 AS "issueQty", 'N' AS "unityIssueYn", o.customer_name AS "rcverNm", '82' AS "rcverTelNationNo", SUBSTRING(regexp_replace(o.customer_phone,'[^0-9]','','g'),1,3) AS "rcverTelAreaNo", SUBSTRING(regexp_replace(o.customer_phone,'[^0-9]','','g'),4,4) AS "rcverTelExchgeNo", SUBSTRING(regexp_replace(o.customer_phone,'[^0-9]','','g'),8,4) AS "rcverTelNo" FROM order_tickets ot JOIN order_items oi ON oi.id = ot.order_item_id JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN order_item_options oio ON oio.order_item_id = oi.id JOIN product_option_values pov ON pov.id = oio.option_value_id WHERE o.id = #{orderId} AND oi.partner_id = 'd16d7f6f-e432-40ee-9f57-e4aaa2c65751' AND ot.partner_order_number IS NULL ORDER BY ot.id, oio.id

SELECT DISTINCT ON (ot.id) ot.id AS "ticketId", CASE pov.code WHEN 'U133192' THEN '4000' WHEN 'U128160' THEN '8000' WHEN 'U134503' THEN '5000' WHEN 'U133189' THEN '6000' END AS "corpCd", CASE pov.code WHEN 'U133192' THEN '11900078' WHEN 'U128160' THEN '20001073' WHEN 'U134503' THEN '11900033' WHEN 'U133189' THEN '20000467' END AS "contNo", TO_CHAR(o.created_at, 'YYYYMMDD') AS "issueDate", ot.partner_order_number AS "reprCponSeq", ot.partner_order_code AS "reprCponIndictNo" FROM order_tickets ot JOIN order_items oi ON oi.id = ot.order_item_id JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN order_item_options oio ON oio.order_item_id = oi.id JOIN product_option_values pov ON pov.id = oio.option_value_id WHERE o.id = #{orderId} AND oi.partner_id = 'd16d7f6f-e432-40ee-9f57-e4aaa2c65751' AND ot.partner_order_code IS NOT NULL AND ot.partner_order_number IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ot.id, oio.id
mapper.update: UPDATE order_tickets SET ticket_used = false, ticket_used_date = NULL WHERE partner_order_code = #{reprCponIndictNo} AND ticket_used = true
